parsed.final_response: I can see how the fear of another low turnout is really holding you back, and it's understandable that you're feeling stuck. It takes a lot of courage to admit that you're scared, and I appreciate your honesty. One tiny step you could take is to just send out a casual 'hey, want to grab dinner soon?' text to one or two close friends, without even planning a whole dinner party yet. This way, you can start small and see if there's any interest without feeling overwhelmed by the possibility of a big event. You're not alone in this, and it's okay to take things one small step at a time.
